title: CobbledCogs
description: Create & Cobblemon themed modpack attempted to be built for performance.
body:
### CobbledCogs, The Fabric Create & Cobblemon-themed modpack built for performance.
Unfortunately, because Create Fabric refuses to port up to 1.21.1, this pack will stay on 1.20.1 indefinitely.

[![paypal-plural](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/donate/paypal-plural_64h.png)](https://www.paypal.com/paypalme/MystixMew)
### What kind of Mods are included in CobbledCogs?
> CobbledCogs has [Cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon), [Create Fabric](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric), [ComputerCraft](https://modrinth.com/mod/cc-tweaked), [Botania](https://modrinth.com/mod/botania), and [AE2](https://modrinth.com/mod/ae2). CobbledCogs also has many different add-ons for these mods to bring out as many possibilities for your enjoyment. While CobbledCogs has the previously listed mods it also has mods such as [Xaero's Minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap) & [Xaero's Worldmap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-world-map) with [Cobblemon icons](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/e19_cobblemon_minimap_icons).

### What makes CobbledCogs unique compared to other modpacks?
> CobbledCogs was built with the intent of having a **playable environment** for players with lower PC performance, We try to get the best possible performance for our players with **each update**.

### Here is some information you should know about CobbledCogs.
> We recommend a **minimum of 6-8GB of RAM** on your instance, Although we may be building this mod pack for performance **some mods** will require more RAM than others will.
